name: LanguageAbility
description: Ability of an individual to understand or converse in a language.

isFavouriteLanguage.description: A “true” value specifies whether the language is considered by the individual as his favourite one

writingProficiency.description: Writing proficiency evaluated for this language

readingProficiency.description: Reading proficiency evaluated for this language

speakingProficiency.description: Speaking proficiency evaluated for this language

listeningProficiency.description: Listening proficiency evaluated for this language
